title: feishu-deck-h5 designer outline
description: Contract for runs/<...>/output/outline.json produced by the designer subskill. Top level is scenario + design_plan + slides[]; every slide carries a stable kebab-case key, a role, a layout_intent (raw:<...> by default), a single_focus, a density_budget, and a six-dimension design_spec. This is a self-check contract, not a render-time gate.

scenario.description: Pitch goal, audience, decision context, setting, language (zh-only default), optional risk_level / proof_requirements / source_summary.

design_plan.description: Narrative arc + visual direction + hero pages + risks/open_questions feeding the rehearsal simulator.

key.description: Stable kebab-case semantic id, not a positional name like slide-01.

layout_intent.description: raw:<pattern-or-intent> by default; schema:<layout> only for pure standard shapes.

density_budget.description: core block + supporting evidence <= layout capacity; non-empty for raw slides.

design_spec.description: Per-slide design spec. For raw slides it must cover the six dimensions (字号/容器/装饰/对齐/字距/字重), whether as discrete keys or as prose (e.g. six_dim_A / Q2_tiers). outline-lint.py checks coverage; the schema only pins the shape.
